name: S-3 --emit-md writes a markdown coverage report alongside the JSON matrix per the architecture COVERAGE.md target
command:
mkdir -p tree/g && printf '
rules:
  - {id: r-1, provenance: [{source: google-jsguide, section_id: "5.2"}]}
' > tree/g/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/build-coverage-matrix.sh" --tree tree --emit-md COVERAGE.md 2>err.txt && [ -s COVERAGE.md ] && grep -q 'google-jsguide' COVERAGE.md && echo markdown 1>&2
